title: gordonia cristalensis
intro: Gordonia cristalensis, also known as the Balsam of Peru or Populneus balsam, is a plant-based resin obtained from the bark of the Garcinia handschii tree, native to South America. The resin is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Gordonia cristalensis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats. Gordonia cristalensis is often prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of tinctures, salves, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or used in aromatherapy to harness its medicinal properties.
